title: Anthropic launches Claude for Teachers in the US
friendlyTitle: Anthropic launches free Claude tools for US teachers
summary: Anthropic is offering verified US K-12 educators free premium Claude access, teaching skills and a Learning Commons connector tied to standards in all 50 states. The product includes curriculum-linked lesson support and says teacher and student data will not be used for model training.
friendlySummary: Verified K-12 teachers in the US can get free Claude tools for lesson planning, class materials and other teaching tasks.
whyItMatters: This is a substantial attempt to move classroom AI from generic prompting to bounded, curriculum-aware teacher workflows, with data handling and educator control made explicit.
friendlyWhyItMatters: The tools are designed to save teachers time while keeping them in charge. Anthropic says the data is not used to train its models.
